title: Deep Sea Anglerfish Glowing Coloring Page
seoTitle: Deep Sea Anglerfish Glowing Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Enjoy coloring this detailed deep sea anglerfish with its glowing head light lure. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Male anglerfishs are much smaller than females and act as sexual parasites, fusing physically with the female to share blood vessels.
The anglerfish lives at depths of up to 6,000 feet, where the pressure is over 150 times that of the surface.
